creator: gj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The Gigabyte GA-MA78GPM-DS2H motherboard works very well with 8-CURRENT.

All onboard peripherals work fine.  I have tested the following peripherals

SATA with AHCI enabled.  Note that SATA DVD burners do not seem to work.
USB using the USB2 stack.  UMASS and FTDI serial adapters work.
Firewire with an external HDD enclosure.
The onboard re0 ethernet controller.
The onoard HDA sound controller (had to add hw.snd.default_unit=2 to /etc/sysctl.conf).  I've only used the headphone output.
The onboard graphics using xf86-video-ati-6.9.0.

I have 6GB of memory installed and am using ZFS.
